independence: The reviewer did not implement the tuning or capture artifacts.
method: Original-resolution visual review of both full-frame and shared dense-detail comparisons, including comparison with the prior failed evidence and rejected stair-stepped previews.

flowerCentralDisks.observation: Recognizable flower centers remain enclosed and visually distinct in both the full frame and dense crop.

flowerPetalBoundaries.observation: Radiating petal separations survive around the major flowers without collapsing into the prior large blank merged fields.

flowerOverlapAndWatercolorability.observation: Overlapping flowers, petals, and neighboring forms remain separable as coherent regions an artist could follow and watercolor.

pineconeCompleteOuterSilhouette.observation: The full-frame comparison preserves the pinecone's complete tapered outer silhouette from crown through rounded base.

pineconeLayeredScaleRows.observation: Repeated overlapping scale rows are legible across the upper, middle, and lower cone in both views.

pineconeScaleTipsAndInteriorForms.observation: Major pointed scale tips and enclosed interior scale forms remain readable instead of being reduced to sparse isolated loops.

smootherThanRejectedArtifacts.observation: Long diagonals and curved boundaries are materially smoother than the rejected stair-stepped lattice artifacts while retaining useful form detail.

noFalseFrameOrGrossClipping.observation: Neither case emits a false fitted-image rectangle, and the subject geometry remains within the intended composition without gross clipping.

shortStrokesDescribeFormsOrJunctions.observation: The few visually short marks occur at small flower-center details, scale features, or boundary junctions rather than as residual texture.

visualJudgmentStatement: Metrics did not substitute for visual judgment; the PASS verdict depends on the named forms being visibly preserved in the committed PNG evidence.
